description: You are a Production Assistant. A sequence of 12 scanned animation frames in '/home/ga/OpenToonz/inputs/muybridge_horse/' was drawn to be animated 'on twos' (each drawing held for 2 frames) in a 24fps project. Import this sequence into OpenToonz and configure the Xsheet so each image is exposed for exactly 2 frames, resulting in a 24-frame animation. Render the result as a sequentially named PNG sequence (e.g., twos_import.0001.png) to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/twos_import/'.
